properties.dose: Oral Light: 5-10mg Common: 10-20mg Strong: 20-50mg+ | Insufflated Light: 2-5mg Common: 5-15mg Strong: 20-40mg+
properties.summary: Rare and little known analogue of phenmetrazine, which is slightly more potent than other analogues. It is suspected to be a stimulating, appetite supressing drug with high misuse potential. The drug is suspected to be a dopamine and/or norepinephrine releasing agent.
